nasb.text: But I am hard-pressed from both directions, having the desire to depart and be with Christ, for that is very much better;

esv.text: I am hard pressed between the two. My desire is to depart and be with Christ, for that is far better.

cnv.text: 我處於兩難之間，情願離世與基督同在，因為那是好得無比的。

ccb.text: 我处在两难之间。我情愿离开世界，与基督在一起，那实在是再好不过了。

csbs.text: 我正处在两难之间：我渴望离世与基督在一起，因为这是好得无比的；
